chapter_title.ar: بَابُ السَّعْيِ بَيْنَ الصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ وَ مَا يُقَالُ فِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 142 – The Sa’ee between Al-Safa and Al-Marwa and what is to be said during it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/72)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/72)
text: لَيْسَ لِلَّهِ مَنْسَكٌ أَحَبَّ إِلَيْهِ مِنَ السَّعْيِ وَ ذَلِكَ أَنَّهُ يُذِلُّ فِيهِ الْجَبَّارِينَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, raising it, said,
‘There is no ritual more Beloved to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> than the Sa’ee, and that is because therein every tyrant is humbled’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad who in a marfu‘ manner has said the following: “He (the Imam) has said, ‘No act of Hajj is more beloved to Allah than ‘Sa‘y’ because it humbles the tyrants.’”
